sigWerErrors.reason: '美' is a Chinese character, while 'Mei-Ling' is the romanized version of the name. The meaning is preserved as it refers to the same name, just in different scripts.
'玲' is the second character of the name '美玲' (Mei-Ling). The actual transcription combines both characters into the romanized full name, so the meaning is preserved.
The difference is only punctuation, which should be ignored.
The deletion is of a punctuation mark, which does not affect meaning.
